description_long: This is a human-like doll featuring a large, detailed head with a pale complexion, sharply defined eyebrows, and short, slicked-back black hair. The facial features are stylized, with prominent eyes, a small nose, and a neutral mouth, giving the doll a slightly stern or serious expression. The body is dressed in a black outfit that covers the torso, arms, and legs, with the hands and feet also visible. The clothing appears to be a single-piece suit, possibly resembling a formal or business style, and the shoes are dark in color. The doll's proportions are exaggerated, with a head that is larger in relation to the body, typical of many collectible or display dolls. The surface of the doll is smooth and glossy, suggesting it is made primarily of molded plastic.
description: A stylized human-like doll with a large, detailed head, slicked-back black hair, and a black full-body outfit. The surface is smooth and glossy, with a neutral facial expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, slicked-back hair, and full black outfit with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the ear, and the side of the black outfit.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head with shiny black hair and the back of the black outfit.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite profile, ear, and the side of the black outfit.
attribute_clothing_style: A single-piece black suit resembling a formal or business outfit, with long sleeves and pants, and dark shoes. The style is minimalist with no visible patterns or embellishments.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with arms slightly extended outward and legs straight. The head faces forward, and the body posture is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with slightly arched eyebrows, wide-open eyes, and a closed mouth, giving a serious or stern appearance.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight, slicked-back black hair with a glossy finish.
